entry.title: PostgreSQL on SAP BTP - Instance sharing | 'reference' service plan
entry.content:
PostgreSQL instances can be shared between different environments and different accounts to enable reuse of instances in various scenarios.

The mechanism leverages a configuration parameter for service instance creation/update and supports different scenarios:

  • Sharing a Service instance between different sub-accounts.
  • Sharing a Service instance between Kyma and Cloud Foundry.
  • Sharing a Service instance between Cloud Foundry and Kyma.

In this blog post we will try to explain the steps to create a "reference" instance pointing to a shared PostgreSQL instance. We will touch the below topics:

  1. Update an already active instance as ‘sharable’ using BTP Cockpit
  2. Create a new ‘virtual’ instance referencing a source instance
  3. Cloud Foundry (CF) CLI operations for updating and creating shared instances
  4. Kyma environment: allowing access to PostgreSQL shared instances

Please note:

  • You can only share service instances of the service plan ’standard’ or ’premium’. It only works in between sub-accounts inside the same BTP region, the sharing works also between different global accounts, but the sub-accounts need to be both in same region (e.g. EU10).
  • A reference service instance can be used like any "standard", "premium” instance, to be able to create it you need to use ‘reference’ service plan as entitlements.
  • You can bind or unbind it, create service keys etc., however, to modify database settings or configurations, you still need to use the source instance.

1️⃣  Update an active instance as ‘sharable’ using BTP Cockpit

A Postgres instance can be shared between different accounts in the same landscape, the source instance needs to be shared explicitly to be able to create a "reference" instance afterwards.
As a first step to use shared instances you need to setup the source instance with the list of sub-accounts that you allow to share the instances.
So, you need to have already available at least one target sub-account to add to the instance shares list

Configure your instance as ‘sharable’:

To be able to share an instance you need to add the list of sub-accounts that who want to share with.
An instance can only be share via an update process and not during the creation.
Go to the source sub-account where you have the instance and update the parameter ‘instance_shares’ with the list of sub-accounts where you want to created new instances referencing the shared one. To create the "reference" instance use the 'reference' service plan entitlement.

Below the JSON block that you need to use to update the the instance share list:

{
"instance_shares":{
"op": "add",
"values": [<”suba-account1”>]
}
}

The list of sub-accounts is additive, so you do not need to always provide the complete list of sub-accounts IDs. You can use the operations “op” to update the list of sub-accounts:

  • “add” – add sub-account
  • “delete” – delete sub-account

In the update command parameters you need to provide the list of subs-accounts, see below example:

{
"instance_shares":{
"op": "add",
"values": [”1b73a8a4-357b-xxxx-8a37-1c245b83c443"]
}
}

In the source sub-account, go to your instance and select update option and add the above JSON block.

Note: 

  • The update operation can only include this parameter (including more parameters in the JSON block will result in an update error).
  • A new extension api endpoint is available to retrieve shared status ('instance_share_status') and the list of all shared sub-accounts for an instance ('shared_subaccounts'), please refer to the official product documentation on the SAP Help Portal.

2️⃣  Create a new ‘virtual’ instance referencing a source instance using BTP Cockpit

Create a new ‘virtual’ instance in the target sub-account:

By "virtual" instance we mean an instance that is referencing a "physical" instance deployed as shared with the sub-account where you want to create a "reference" instance.

To be able to create a instance using as reference a shared instance, you need to have the proper entitlements in your target sub-account ('reference' service plan). Please verify if you have the “reference” service plan available, as shown below:

Check your entitlements (‘reference’ service plan). 

After selecting the “reference” service plan, you need to fill the rest of the inputs as a normal instance creation.

Select “next” as you will need to add the source instance ID. Check the source instance ID that you want to use as reference in the source sub-account, using the BTP Cockpit instance details, then use it in the 'source_instance_id' JSON block parameter, for creating the "reference" instance.

After adding the 'source_instance_id', you can select 'Create'. After you can check the new instance details and you will be able to see that was created using the ‘reference’ service plan.

The 'source_instance_id 'parameter is visible in the instance parameters via BTP Cockpit or you can retrieve it via be below Cloud Foundry command line (CLI):

cf service <instance name> --params

3️⃣  CF CLI operations for updating and reference shared instances

Alternative to BTP Cockpit operations you can use also the Cloud Foundry CLI operations to execute the necessary steps to create and update the instance configurations.

Share a service instance

To share a service instance to a sub-account you can share the source instance using the below CF CLI command:

cf update-service ${source-instance-name} -c '{"instance_shares":{"op": "add", "values": ["<subaccount1>"]}'

If the reference service instance has been deleted, you can also unshare the previously shared instance from the sub-account, using the below command:

cf update-service ${source-instance-name} -c '{"instance_shares":{"op": "delete", "values": ["<subaccount2>"]}'

Create a new ‘virtual’ service instance

To create a reference instance for the Postgres instance with the instance ID <source-instance-id>, please leverage the following CF CLI command:

cf create-service postgresql-db reference reference-example -c '{"source_instance_id": "<source-instance-id>"}'

‘reference’ is the service plan | ‘reference-example’ is the name of the new "virtual" instance to be created.

4️⃣  Kyma environment: Allowing access to PostgreSQL shared instances

Sharing a Service Instance between Kyma and Cloud Foundry

A PostgreSQL instance created in Kyma can also be shared to a Cloud Foundry environment in the same sub-account, but you need to share the service instance from Kyma, even if you stay in the same sub-account <subaccount_id>.

You can do it via BTP Cockpit using the Kyma dashboard, and updating the service instance parameters. Don’t forget that to share the instance you need to add to the instance parameters in kyma the ‘instance_shares’ values:

parameters: instance_shares: op: add values: - <subaccount_id>

For this scenario, you need to explicitly add your CF domain <cf_domain> to the ’allow_list’ parameter of your PostgreSAL in Kyma to allow access from Cloud Foundry.

A Postgres instance created in Cloud Foundry can also be shared to a Kyma environment in the same sub-account

Be aware that sharing a CF private instance with Kyma is not supported, as the it needs to be accessible from Kyma and the CF instance needs to be created with the ‘public_access' parameter set to true.

Note: ‘allow_access’ - per default an instance with public access enabled is accessible from any Cloud Foundry app in the CF landscape it was provisioned. Any additional IP to be allowlisted need to be added into this allowlist. Each time you provide here a new IP/domain, it will overwrite the existing settings, so always provide the complete list of IPs if you update 'allow_access' parameter.

For this scenario, you need to explicitly add your Kyma cluster-ip <cluster_ip> to the ’allow_list’ of your PostgreSQL instance in Cloud Foundry to make sure access from Kyma is possible.

We hope the information provided above assists you in taking full advantage of the shared instance feature in PostgreSQL on SAP BTP.

Please check out the blog post below, where we've shared a list of key topics from the product team.

  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP - Are you looking for official blog posts? Blog INDEX

For other relevant product updates and features refer always to the product official documentation at SAP Help Portal.

Thanks for your reading,

SAP BTP Backing Services – Product Management

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports: is it possible to get higher resolut...
entry.content:
Hi Yum,

Here' the info in KBA regarding the fix in CR for VS:

  

 

   3333218 - HTML export of Crystal Reports with logo using .NET SDK results in a cropped and blurred logo

Symptom

  • HTML export of Crystal Reports with logo using .NET SDK results in a cropped and blurred logo.
  • Exporting the Crystal Reports to PDF doesn't affect the logo.
  • The issue doesn't occur with the CR designer, only with the .NET SDK.

Other Terms

CR .NET SDK, exporting, HTML 4.0, logo truncated, distorted.

Reason and Prerequisites

Environment

  • SAP Crystal Reports, version for Microsoft Visual Studio SP34
  • SAP Crystal Reports Server 2020, OEM Edition Support Package 3

Reproducing the Issue

  1. Create a Crystal Report with logo(picture object)
  2. Export the Crystal report to HTML40 format using .NET SDK.
  3. The logo in the exported HTML document is cropped and blurred.

Cause

The reason for the undesired behavior is a program error.

entry.title: Re: User Data considerations when implementing Employee Central with Learning
entry.content:
We are in the process of testing a new employee export through Integration Center. 

We ran into an LMS Refresh Failure when trying to refresh our Learning System. The documentation explained that there was a "Required for SuccessFactors Learning Sync" parameter is not enable for the Employee Export job. 

Do you have a workaround for this issue?

entry.title: App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded. ODATA
entry.content:
Intro 

Once I tried to use an improperly maintained SAP system. There I opened the Process pMRP simulation app. While opening it I had an issue like the app below could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.

So, I checked online and found a solution. I would like to share the same.

Main Part

Solution:

I copied the error message from the popup and pasted it into a notepad. Where I found the service name like this

- /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/pp_pmrp_psims1

-/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/pp_pmrp_pcomps1

-/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/pp_pmrp_pcaps1

-/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/pp_pmrp_pwlsts1

-/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/pp_pmrp_pboms1

Note: Activate all these to get the pMRP working fine

Then went to SICF Tcode.

Pasted the service path and clicked execute.

Then activated the service.

You can have a look in to this 2808615 I dont know why SAP having different methods and tcoded to activate services. Please explain if you have idea.

Later tried to open the app. But got another issue like below.

Then again searched for solution. Later found some service were not maintained in SAP ODATA. So maintained it via the tcodes
- /IWFND/ERROR_LOG - SAP Gateway Error Log   - to find the missing ODATA service
- /IWBEP/REG_VOCAN - Maintain Vocabulary Annotations  - To get the service name from vocabulary annot
- /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE - Activate and Maintain Services - To maintain the service.

This is another way of maintaining the ODATA Services for FIORI apps.

After doing all clear the cache in SAP and browser

Transaction:
/IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP

/IWBEP/CACHE_CLEANUP 

Run Report in SE38
- /UI2/CHIP_SYNCHRONIZE_CACHE

- /UI2/DELETE_CACHE_AFTER_IMP

- /UI2/DELETE_CACHE

- /UI5/UPDATE_CACHEBUSTER

- /UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES

Have look to Cache clear 

At last got the app

Conclusion:

I hope this will support on on getting the fiori app to work. 

Please comment your thoughts.

entry.title: Re: The 'READ' method for both display and edit mode
entry.content:
This is because when pressing the Edit button you start the transactional processing. 

When working with API's such BAPI's you would want to retrieve the data that resides in the transactinal buffer.

Developing Unmanaged Transactional Apps | SAP Help Portal

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: how to upload XML files with more than 100 MB?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We're trying to upload the XML template files of some Migration Objects in the Migration Cockpit, but during the uploads, we're getting some errors saying that files with more than 100 MBs aren't accepted, as the error message below:

  • Upload canceled. Please make sure each file is smaller than 100 megabytes.

As the XML template files we're trying to upload indeed have more than 100 MBs, could you explain:

  • How can we upload XML template files with more than 100 MBs to the Migration Cockpit?

We're using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, if it matters. Thanks for the support!

Best regards,
Data migration expert team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit: how to upload XML files with more...
entry.content:
Dear experts,

As stated by the Migration Cockpit app, the official limit for XML template file sizes is indeed 100 MBs, but there are a few ways to upload files larger than that. To summarize and list them below, the template files can be:

  1. Compressed in zip folders to reduce the data, and thus, the size they occupy.
  2. Split in multiple, smaller files.
  3. Sent with more than 100 MBs of data by changing the parameter icm/HTTP/max_request_size_KB in the system (only appliable to SAP S/4HANA On-Prem and Cloud Private Edition systems).

As stated above, the first solution would be to simply compress such templates in zip folders. Zipping files compresses the data contained in them, and thus, reduces the amount of MBs they occupy.

The second solution would be to split such templates in multiple, smaller XML files. To help with that, in KBA 2719524, SAP provides a link to a file splitter tool made exclusively to help split large XML Migration Object template files.

The third and last solution listed, which is only appliable to SAP S/4HANA OP and Cloud Private Edition systems, involves editing some system parameters to increase file size limit of the app. Further explanation about this can also be found in the KBA 2719524.

I hope this helps with your query and good luck with your future Migration Projects!

Best regards,
SAP Support

Looking at the URL, I noticed that some apps got GUID like prefix and some don't.

with prefix

 

without prefix

 

Does anybody know why some apps get prefix?

With prefixed app, I have the following issue. So I would like to know how I can get rid of this prefix.

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Could not get the ApiHub resource data
entry.content:
Hi,

I don't know if you have solved it yet, but I'm having the same issue and I wanted to share a way around this problem.

The solution consists on creating a Destination in SAP BTP and consuming the Business Accelerator Hub API through it in BAS.

1. Access Business Accelerator Hub and search for the API you want to consume. In my case, I'm using Sales Order (A2X) as a demo.

2. Once in the API page, scroll down in the Overview tab to the API resources. There, click on Configuration Details. We will be using the links provided there. In my case, I'll copy the sandbox URL.

3. Go to the Destination section of your SAP BTP subaccount. Here you have to creat a Destination for Business Accelerator Hub with the following configuration.

The property URL.headers.ApiKey will not appear as an option in the dropdown, you have to write it yourself. The value will be your Business Accelerator Hub Api key.

The URL will be "https://sandbox.api.sap.com" for sandbox.

4. We can now go to BAS and add the service in the Service Center. Instead of selecting the Business Accelerator Hub in the Provider selection, we will choose 'SAP SYSTEM'. There, our recently created destination will appear. If it doesn't show, refresh BAS.

 5. We select the apihub_sandbox service. In the Service Path Input, we have to copy the half of the API URL that we left behind when we created the Destination.

  • The part we used for the destination: https://sandbox.api.sap.com 
  • Our API URL: /s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_salesorder/srvd_a2x/sap/salesorder/0001

After clicking on Connect, the Add to Project button should be displayed and the API content should appear below the Connect button. After that, we can add the service to our project.

 I hope that you find this useful.

Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello, I am from India and looking forward to write blogs in SAP Security space.

entry.title: Re: The 'READ' method for both display and edit mode
entry.content:
probably you can try abstract entity.

although it is not same "Read" method for read&query, but both call are handled by your code and under your control.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_Quality Management_Incoming...
entry.content:
Hi @thangarajthomas,

for inspection type 03 one inspection lot is created per production order. Due to this multiple usage decisions are not supported. Also there are no operation-wise usage decisions in inspection lots.

You could think of using inspection points. Then, when saving recorded results in app "Record Inspection Results - For Operation" the user can document yield, scrap and/or rework and a cause for the production operation (please see screenshot attached). Causes can be defined in configuration (Define Reasons for Variances). 

Prerequisites:

  • Inspection points type is maintained in the header data of the routing
  • You have a sampling procedure with inspection points maintained for the inspection characteristics
  • In the routing operation you have maintained settings for inspection point completion in section Quality Management: Inspection Points as Quantity, valuation and confirmation (production)

Kind regards
Franziska

entry.title: Count the number of items in a warehouse
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to count the number of items in a warehouse. I already have the query to retrieve the items, but I'm not sure how to use $count to perform the count

URL : 

https://<my sever>:50000/b1s/v1/$crossjoin(Items,Items/ItemWarehouseInfoCollection)?$expand=Items($select=ItemCode,ItemName)&$filter=Items/ItemCode eq Items/ItemWarehouseInfoCollection/ItemCode and Items/ItemWarehouseInfoCollection/WarehouseCode eq '1'

Thanks!.

entry.title: Re: Error when publishing cds
entry.content: Are you trying to publish a V4 service ?

entry.title: Re: While doing results recording in QE51n, I could not l...
entry.content:
Hi @rohitpattar, 

To trigger results copy manually use a classic app for changing an inspection lot, e.g. “Process Inspection Lots - Worklist” and open the inspection lot in edit mode. Navigate to ‘More’ > ‘Edit’ > ‘Copy Inspection Results’. To view the transfer log use a classic app for displaying (or changing) an inspection lot, e.g. “Display Inspection Lots - Worklist”. Navigate to ‘More’ > ‘Extras’ > ‘Transfer Log’.

Kind regards
Franziska

there are no templates we offer. Testing is best done with real data, therefore I would personally always recommend asking your bank for such a file and upload the real file directly into the system.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: How to create a custom mapping IFlow?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud MyInbox footer customization
entry.content:
I solved like this and it's working (hidding the Claim button):

onAfterRendering() {
        var hideButtonWithClaimText = function () {
          var button = $("button:contains('Claim')");

          if (button.length > 0) {
            button.hide();
          } else {
            // If the button is not found, check again after a short delay
            setTimeout(hideButtonWithClaimText, 100); // 100ms delay
          }
        }

        // Start the process by calling the function
        hideButtonWithClaimText();
      }

Not soo elegant but it's working fine

entry.title: Re: How to create a custom mapping IFlow?
entry.content: Upload of the resource failed. The project must contain valid source folders.

entry.title: Re: Do we have a way to migrate the Open Hubs from BWonHA...
entry.content:
Hey Vinay, 

Open Hub is not supported by BW Bridge. 

The reason of BW Bridge is to get BW Objects into DSP.

You can use Replication Flows for outbound data from DSP.

 

Martin

What is displayed is not the proper technique. Simply select the appropriate role from the Fiori apps library and activate the app using STC01.

entry.title: Re: How to Push Data from SAP Datasphere Back to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Hey Tejas, regardless S/4 of on-premise, or cloud, you have to use the HANA connection. If you cannot see any folders/schemas/containers, you may have an issue with authorizations. The Replication Flow allows you to push back from DSP. I use the RFC_DWC as target container. Fetching data from S/4 - via the HANA Connection- either data flow tables, or replication flow for ODP / CDS Views.. I do this on my own :). Works well. Check the link for the HANA connection. Martin

entry.title: OData service limitations
entry.content: We want to create OData service to consume SAP Datasphere (DS) analytical model into tools like Power BI, Service Now etc. Are there any limitations when the analytical models are consumed in other tools using OData service vs SAC. I mean does the analytic model behave same in other tools vs SAC? What other points to consider when consuming analytical models using OData service.

entry.title: Re: Cheat sheet for URI patterns for calling OData actions and functions
entry.content:
Hi @MatthiasH,

Thanks for reading this blog.

From the metadata file your provided, your function looks to be a bound one (IsBound="true"). Therefore, I recommend trying with the following pattern:

https://oursaphost/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zapi_whse_ipoint_o4/srvd_a2x/sap/zapi_whse_ipoint/0001/<serviceName>.getDestinationsByHUContent(EWMWarehouse='AM01',WorkCenter='R1I1',HandlingUnitNumber='00000000003000000200')

Best regards,

Mio

entry.title: Re: Can Overview Page use OData v4 to configure analysis...
entry.content: @JiaHao_He Can I confirm whether your backend service is CAP or RAP?

entry.title: Best Practice additional scope id activation
entry.content:
We have activated BP Z_US_SOLUTION. Now we have a requirement to activate additional scope item in this solution.

About this scenario, SAP note 2938086 states the following:

"At a later point of time, if you need more scope items to be activated, you can change the Z_CUST solution and add the scope items you need, then activate them in Implementation Assistant.”

Question:

  • Can we just edit the solution activated and further activate the scope item needed? If so can we transport the activation of scope item from BP client to business client?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Best Practice additional scope id activation
entry.content:
The scope of "Z_US_SOLUTION" can be extended and the solution re-activated under the following prerequisites:

  • The system is still on the same release/PFS as when the first content activation was done.
  • The customizing of the client has not been manually changed.
  • No transactional data has been posted in the client.

So basically, the client/system must be in the state where the last activation ended. Otherwise the changes can lead to activation errors for the added scope or manual customer configuration might be overwritten.

If above conditions are not met in the original activation client, a scope extension in the client is not supported anymore.

What it can also be done as a workaround (with quite some effort) in this case is to create a new client in the system, where he first activates the old scope again then closes the activation transport, then does the scope extension there recording changes in a new transport and move this new transport to the business client.

entry.title: Controle de cópia fatura - ordem de venda
entry.content:
Boa tarde!
Estou criando uma ordem de venda de complemento de valor com referência a uma fatura de venda.

A minha fatura possui código de imposto M2, que está cadastrado na J1BTAX com Direito Fiscal ICMS IC0, porém possui uma exceção fiscal quando o emissor e receptor são do MT, trazendo Dir.Fisc. ICMS RBI.

Ao criar uma ordem de venda referenciando a fatura de venda, a expectativa é que o Direito Fiscal apresentasse as informações da fatura. Porém os dados estão sendo validados na J1BTAX de acordo com a categoria de item e código de imposto cadastrado.

Gostaria de saber se há alguma possibiliade de puxar as informações do cód.imposto e direito fiscal no controle de cópia da VTAF. Ou se a solução seria somente criando uma nova categoria de item com o cód de imposto de já tem a exceção fiscal?

entry.title: Guidance on Retrieving and Downloading Attachment Folder Data
entry.content:
Assistance with retrieving and downloading attachment folder data from an attachment folder using the web service ManageAttachmentFolderIn or the BusinessObject AttachmentFolder.


Could you please provide guidance on how to achieve this scenario?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Guidance on Retrieving and Downloading Attachment Fol...
entry.content:
Dear,

Hope all is well.

To retrieve the data using the ManageAttachmentFolderIn service interface, the document UUID of the attachment document is required. In order to gather this UUID, an initial query to the service interface of the business object needs to be performed, which will query all attachments of that specific object and their respective UUID. Then this can be used to query the attachment as a binary object using the attachment folder interface.

For example:

To retrieve the attachment data of the Material ABC, you can perform a query for the material using the service interface "QueryMaterialIn" with the example payload below:

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:glob="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <glob:MaterialByElementsQuery_sync>
      
         <RequestedElements>
            <Material>ABC</Material>
         </RequestedElements>
         
      </glob:MaterialByElementsQuery_sync>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

*Where ABC refers to the Material ID*

In the response payload, you can search for the UUID under the Attachment Folder field in the payload.

Once the UUID of the document is located, you can use the UUID of the document to retrieve the Attachment data.

For retrieving the data, you can perform a query using the ManageAttachmentFolderIn with the operation ReadDocumentsFileContent, using the example below.

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:glob="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <glob:AttachmentFolderDocumentsFileContentByIDQuery_sync>
         <AttachmentFolderDocumentFileContentByIDQuery>
            <!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
            <DocumentUUID>CDF</DocumentUUID>
         </AttachmentFolderDocumentFileContentByIDQuery>
      </glob:AttachmentFolderDocumentsFileContentByIDQuery_sync>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

*Where CDF refers to the Document UUID retrieved in the previous query.*

*The examples above where taken from our internal systems, therefore the headers must be adjusted for your respective WSDL .*

In the response payload, you will receive the Binary Object of the attachment.

In this case, a Base64 decoder will be required to convert the data into the Original file.

Please refer to the below blog and Web Service documentation, which provide more insights on the matter.

Inbound Service Manage Attachment Folders

https://help.sap.com/doc/a2b4c7ef61d64397b2b1d052082a8a08/2405/en-US/PSM_ISI_R__DOC_II_MANAGE_ATTCHMNT_FLD_IN.html

Read and Write ByDesign Attachments using Web Services

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/read-and-write-bydesign-attachments-using-web-services/ba-p/13281980

Regards,
Vinicius

entry.title: Re: SWAGTAG - I am a SAP Champion
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'd like to share my story with you.

First, a big thank you to @SergioG_TX ! I really admire him for his local group and the BBQ pictures he sometimes posts. I hope to meet him in person soon. He also tagged one of my closest SAP Champion friends, @Marssel700 , who is also a friend of mine and a former colleague.

To introduce myself:
I was once a DJ by passion and a not-so-great computer science student. I decided to become a consultant because I love to travel and meet people from around the world or across the nation. But after starting work as an SAP partner, I fell in love with it all over again. 💿
Me as a young dj

 

 

 

The incredible community motivated me to become a speaker at SAP Inside Track events, participate in events across Europe, and organize the first  SAP meetup in Italy. I've written several blogs specifically about BTP and SAPUI5, and I'm a passionate SAP developer. I’ve always tried (and still do, though less frequently now) to help SAPUI5 developers in the community as much as I can. ☁️

Now, I'm in the U.S. and working on building a new community in NYC. I’ve already organized the first meetup and am planning the second and third ones.

Me with the new polo

 

 

 

I can't wait to meet you all. I’d like to tag:

  • @MariettaLopez : Because I was in Mexico City, but I was busy and didn’t get to meet her.
  • @NilPeksen  : Because she was the first Champion and an inspiration for me to organize my first meetup. She’s super kind and fun to hang out with in her city.
  • @patty_1982 : A former colleague who build my first SAP Inside Track when I was a Speaker and she is an incredibly skilled and capable SAP Champion. She also advice me to a restaurant in Rome that I’ll never forget and continue to visit every time I’m in the city.

I didn’t do it on purpose, but I ended up mentioning all women in tech. Big shoutout to them! 💪

entry.title: Re: Unable to run Cloud Connector on M2 or Intel processo...
entry.content:
For your machine with M2 processor, you should install the aarch64 / ARM64 versions of both: the Cloud Connector and the SapMachine (17 or 21). The error message indicates that the used architectures do not match.
See also https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/installation-on-mac-os-x

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio - Preview language
entry.content: after the question mark you can add sap-language=***

entry.title: Re: Smartforms print next pages no Items complete the windows
entry.content: Hi!

entry.title: Re: COSP and FAGLFLEXT discrepancy
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Re: Smartforms print next pages no Items complete the windows
entry.content: I found the problem. There was Code in the 'MAIN' Windows that it caused the problem.

entry.title: Re: COSP and FAGLFLEXT discrepancy
entry.content: 1. GLP2 2. FAGL_CO_PLAN y funciono

entry.title: Re: Smartforms print next pages no Items complete the win...
entry.content: The '%CODE4' in 'MAIN' caused the problem. I changed it to another Windows and it solved the error.

entry.title: Re: How to add parameters to GUI Transaction Fiori tile and access it in Custom Fiori App
entry.content: Bumping

entry.title: Re: CDS VIEW Project Responsible Person name on SAP Cloud
entry.content: Hi clsalerno, instead of starting with I_EnterpriseProject use I_EntProjectEntitlement and join the CDS views for team members and roles from above, otherwise you will have false duplicates created from role and team member CDS views. Kind regards Franziska

entry.title: RAP Line item - Change page size parameter
entry.content:
Hi!

I created a RAP with CDS and a new class with interface IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER.

I'm facing with only 20 registers in page_size parameter. How can i change it to 50? Has any annotation in CDS to change it?

entry.title: Re: SWAGTAG - I am a SAP Champion
entry.content: Great my friend. I have to say, your DJ skills would be perfect for spinning at the next SAP Inside Track happy hour. Let’s turn that closing session into a dance floor! What do you think? 😀

entry.title: CPI Message mapping problems with arrays
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I have the following incoming part of a payload from provider:
...

<acceptedDeclarationOfConsentVersion/>

<dealers>0c0c4930-a014-11e5-94f6-d8913b26e8a6</dealers>
<dealers>d1f822e0-92a4-11e5-9da5-b6f686ff8cf4</dealers>
<preferredCountry>CN</preferredCountry>

..

In the message mapping I have the following:

The problem is, that instead of writing the dealers in the result mapping as following:
<to_dealernr>
<dealerNumber>0c0c4930-a014-11e5-94f6-d8913b26e8a6</dealerNumber>
</to_dealernr>
<to_dealernr>
<dealerNumber>d1f822e0-92a4-11e5-9da5-b6f686ff8cf4</dealerNumber>
</to_dealernr>

They are instead written like this, both under 1 node and the second node empty ..:
<to_dealernr>
<dealerNumber>0c0c4930-a014-11e5-94f6-d8913b26e8a6</dealerNumber>
<dealerNumber>d1f822e0-92a4-11e5-9da5-b6f686ff8cf4</dealerNumber>
</to_dealernr>
<to_dealernr></to_dealernr>

And this is causing issues on API side as the XML is not correctly generated and the API cannot interpret the dealerNumber property when it's not in the correct format.


My question is, what can I do within the mapping in order to achieve the desired mapping which is:
<to_dealernr>
<dealerNumber>0c0c4930-a014-11e5-94f6-d8913b26e8a6</dealerNumber>
</to_dealernr>
<to_dealernr>
<dealerNumber>d1f822e0-92a4-11e5-9da5-b6f686ff8cf4</dealerNumber>
</to_dealernr>

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Error when publishing cds
entry.content: Odata v2

entry.title: What is Federated Process Control (FPC) in SAP Ariba?
entry.content:
I am looking for information that will explain Federated Process Control (FPC) within SAP Ariba. I believe it might have to do with multiple-ERP configurations, but I am not sure if it is solely related to multiple-ERP configurations. I have searched SAP for Me and the SAP Help Portal and am not finding any information that explains what Federated Process Control (FPC) is, when it would be used, or any benefits of using it. Additionally, is there a way to determine if a client has Federated Process Control (FPC) enabled on their site? Any direction towards available resources on this topic would be greatly appreciated!!

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: My geekiest hobby is learning and sharing knowledge!
entry.content:
Hi Ruthvik, I totally get your passion for sharing knowledge. Keep it up. We should team up again for a knowledge sharing event sometime.
My geekiest hobby It's all about diving into the SAP world. I'm busy being an SAP instructor, social media content creator, community participant, and functional consultant at SAP Clients. But when I'm off work, I leave all the SAP talk behind and spend time with my family. We love exploring new places, like countryside hotels and the beautiful tropical beaches in my location. Some of the best in the country.

1st presentation in a SAP Community event in 2013 #SITSP2013

entry.title: BKPF-XBLNR (Reference Field is not changeable)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a existing config, to allows change of field BKPF-XBLNR.

When I enter the document manually F-02, I am able to change the BKPF-XBLNR after the document is posted

We have a case, where accounting doc is posted via Purchase Order and due to some reason we want to change the BKPF-XBLNR field, and system is not allowing to change. Is this happening because the accounting doc is posted via Purchase Order? If we want to change these kinds of document is there any other way?

entry.title: Re: Unable to run Cloud Connector on M2 or Intel processo...

entry.title: Re: Unable to run Cloud Connector on M2 or Intel processo...
entry.content: Hello, I have installed the ARM64 versions of both the cloud connector and SapMachine. Will give it a try again

entry.title: Possible options for API Monitoring via SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
We have setup our customer ISUITE - API Mgt and they've been productive since Feb 2024.  They're now expecting to have heavy use of one particular externally exposed API and want to do monitoring & alerting. We know SAP Cloud ALM has Health Monitoring available specifically for SAP Integration Suite (API Management) but that only monitors/alerts on the certificate IF the configuration has a custom domain (which they don't).    Any other thought about how to monitor availability of the API endpoints and alert on errors/thresholds via SAP Cloud ALM?  

API Mgt has metrics on calls, etc but there is no 'drill down' into the metric.   They want it from the API Mgt level since that's the externally exposed endpoints.   Any other info they can collect from the backend S/4HANA system in ST03. 

Other options currently being considered are detailed in SAP Notes 3222278 & 3096930 - API Management: How to log API interactions to logging server? - SAP for Me  to use Splunk as referenced in the SAP community blog  3222278 - How to enable the detailed logging in API Management Cloud - SAP for Me       Splunk - Part 1 : SAP APIM Logging & Monitoring - SAP Community 

If not in SAP Cloud ALM, we are wondering if the BTP 'Application Logging Service' or the new service BTP 'Cloud Logging' is a better option?  However we are unable to find any documentation related to API Management specifically for those services.

Thank you for the feedback!

entry.title: Re: CPI Message mapping problems with arrays
entry.content:
One thing you could try is changing the occurrences of dealerNumber to 0..1 and only map dealers -> dealerNumber.  I think it will generate the parent appropriately in IA when you do that, but I could be wrong.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Create Role Customer (Fin.Accounting) (FLCU00) in Mass. Is this possible in Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Thousands of customers have been migrated without the Role Customer (Fin.Accounting) (FLCU00). We obviously need that Role to be able to add the G/L Account. I was thinking that in Public Cloud this could be done using scope item (1RK) by using the mass load functionality for a record that is already created. Its a simple insert for an already created BP, but when trying to use the mass load functionality system is giving an error saying that the G/L account does not exist(see image below for more details). I have tried it in different environments (Starter and Dev) and error is the same even if the GL accounts are the right ones for each environment.

To be sure I carried a manual simulation with the same GL account and it does create the missing role without any issue. Does it mean that all the missing roles can only be added manually?

I will attach to this thread, the images of the file that I am using to try and do the mass load. BP is already created in the system so I am only including two tabs BUT000 and KNB1.

Thank you,

M.R.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: My submission for task 2

entry.title: iflow content modifer Issue
entry.content:
Hi team

I am working with  an Iflow,  this Iflow  is a copy of the Iflow: Replicate Generic Data from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S4HANA Using the OData API

This is Namespace Mapping

Content modifier

This is the configuration in Content Modifier

 

The value in Source value to ECCOMPANY is /ns0:getGenericDataReplicationQuery/ProcessingParameter[Name='ECCompany']/Value

I am running a simulation

Simulation is sending this error message

Invalid xpath: /ns0:getGenericDataReplicationQuery/ProcessingParameter[Name='ECCompany']/Value. Reason: javax.xml.xpath.XPathExpressionException: Failure converting a node of class javax.xml.transform.sax.SAXSource: org.xml.sax.SAXParseException; lineNumber: 1; columnNumber: 1; Premature end of file.

Do you know how to solve it?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Suite 7 Extension: What This Means for SAP ERP Human Capital Management Customers
entry.content:
found this . I am also looking for more info on the HCM in S/4 2023 

In order to be able to answer the question concerning the changeover strategy, a complete inventory of precisely those functionalities, operating models and plans for digitization and automation is urgently required. Which solution options are considered and which migration path is ultimately taken depends on the company's situation, goals, and needs. Such an HCM roadmap must be individually tailored to each company, as there is no universally applicable solution recommendation for a course of action.

https://www.natuvion.com/newsroom/sap-hcm-s4hana-successfactors

Need more infor for those who want to continue on HCM without migrating to SF.

Bushair

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: done

entry.title: Re: Include Batch expiration in Material Requirement Planning
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing this solution.

I have facing this requiremt in a farmaceutical industry company with pending requirement.

FEFO Strategy

Acoording to GMP the consumption will be performed in a FEFO strategy.  Batch B7 will be use for demand in W1 (100) and W2 (150). The remainning quantity to expire in W3 will be only 350 (600 -250) instead of 600. The logic needs to be improve to pegging requirement to specific batch. 

I will appreciate any advice.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Suite 7 Extension: What This Means for SAP ERP Human Capital Management Customers
entry.content:
Need more clarity and looking for blogs from SAP.. Why SAP is still promoting the SuccessFActors despiste the S/4 HCM is good enough to continue ? 

 

The key distinction between SAP HCM on premise and SAP H4S4 lies in the interface technology. SAP H4S4 adopts the modern Fiori interface, which is a highlighting feature across all S/4HANA applications. The thoughtful design of the Fiori interface makes it easier even for new users to get started with SAP H4S4. HR personnel can easily carry out key processes like employee onboarding, learning, and development, etc., with ease using the user-friendly interface. Integrating S/4HANA HCM or SAP HCM S/4HANA with other modules enhances data consistency and improves decision-making.

https://www.accely.com/blog/what-is-sap-hcm-for-sap-s-4-hana-on-premise-h4s4/

Need a business case and help from SAP to remain on s/4 HCM without migrating to SF Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Task 0 - Pre-requisite for August developer challenge - "ABAP Core Data Services"
entry.content:
Task 0 is complete


Thank you

entry.title: Re: Return the System Status from ORAP (Order Approved) t...
entry.content:
Hi Vijayalaxmi Melavanki,
Thank you for your response.

The business needs the maintenance order to have it re-approved once there is an additional unplanned material consumption either via reservation and/or purchase requisition.

This scenario always happening in the actual maintenance activities.

Therefore, it is suitable that a maintenance order will be undergo re-approval once cost incurred will be changed especially when the cost added is significant value which need to be approved with several level of approval based on the workflow scenarios for maintenance order approval.

As for phase control code configuration, is it possible to adjust the system status in that way stated above? Or my idea is setting the phase control code to set a certain system status for example (Locked) once the order is set to Work Started to prevent the trades person to add materials and they can add only once the control code is being deactivate by an authorized role.

Regards,

Alvin Infante-

entry.content: What is your input payload?

entry.title: Re: URGENT! Help Required - Not able to see LOCALE fields...

entry.title: Re: How to Customize SAC UI Themes: A Basic Guide
entry.content: This is awesome, Hyun! Very helpful!

entry.title: Re: 【Emergency】 Outputting ledger sheets using GUI applic...
entry.content:
出力プレビューからはPDFファイルを正しく表示することはできません。これはブラウザ（ChromeおよびMS Edge）のPDF表示に起因する問題です。従って、PDFファイルをダウンロードしてAdobe Readerで開くのが推奨する表示方法になります。尚、ブラウザにFirefoxを使用するとこの問題は起こりません。

また、PDFファイルの表示が中国語のように見えているのは、SAP標準のFormに日本語フォントが割り当たっていないことが原因かと推測されます。SAP for meよりCaseを登録してSAP Supportへの問い合わせをお願いします。

entry.title: Re: Time-Dependent Days of Supply.
